creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #57)

I expect:

1. A (security) warning for the user when they disable ASLR in Apache (with every rc command).
2. A warning in all mod_php ports telling the user to migrate to php-fpm as per Apache httpd project guidance. With a link to https://cwiki.apache.org/confluence/display/HTTPD/PHP-FPM

I think we should trust Mina Galić's guidance, an ASF member Apache httpd.
